services.intro: We help companies across four core areas. Pick the one that fits your needs.

valueProp.title: We provide companies with the right talent — fast, flexible and quality-assured.

step1.title: Needs analysis
step1.desc: We start by understanding your business, your requirements and the skills you need — regardless of volume or timeframe. Through thorough mapping we ensure the right profile is matched from the start.

step2.title: Selection & matching
step2.desc: We match candidates from our quality-assured pool based on experience, skills and personality. Every candidate goes through interviews, reference checks and competency verification.

step3.title: Introduction & start
step3.desc: We ensure every employee has the right conditions from day one — with onboarding, safety training and clear instructions tailored to your business.

step4.title: Follow-up & quality
step4.desc: Ongoing quality control and dialogue with you as a client to ensure long-term delivery. We follow up with both you and the employee to guarantee results.

t1.quote: TEAMBEMANNING delivered exactly the talent we needed — fast and professionally. We could scale up our production without compromising quality.
t1.name: Tobias Löfgren

t2.quote: The flexibility and follow-up has been fantastic. We finally have a staffing partner who truly understands our business and needs.
t2.name: Janne Bryner

t3.quote: From first contact to having staff on site took less than 48 hours. Impressive service and reliable employees every time.
t3.name: Sayed Alti

k2.title: Reduced turnover
k2.desc: Right matching leads to longer assignments

contact.title: Contact details
contact.quickResponseDesc: We usually respond within the same business day. Have an urgent staffing need? Call us directly and we'll help you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.gdpr: We handle your data with respect and in accordance with GDPR.

aboutPage.title: Small company, big delivery
aboutPage.desc: TEAMBEMANNING Bemanning combines personal service with professional structure. Based in Sollentuna, we staff across the Stockholm region.
aboutPage.storyP1: TEAMBEMANNING was started to solve an urgent staffing need — and quickly discovered there was a market for a staffing partner who truly listens, matches with care and delivers with reliability.
aboutPage.storyP2: Since the start, we've grown through trust, good matching and long-term relationships. We've never tried to be the biggest — but we strive to be the best at what we do.
aboutPage.visionDesc: Our vision is to build a staffing company that combines the personal and close with the professionalism and structure the market demands. We want to grow — but never at the expense of the relationships we have with our clients and employees.

v1.title: Youth initiative
v1.desc: We help young people into working life in a safe and structured way.

v2.title: Team spirit & sports
v2.desc: Sports teach us discipline, teamwork, responsibility and the importance of doing your best every day.

v3.title: Personal approach
v3.desc: We believe in close relationships — with clients, candidates and each other.

v4.title: Professionalism
v4.desc: We work with clear processes, quality control and high standards.

aboutPage.teamDesc: The people who make TEAMBEMANNING what it is.

whyTeambemanningPage.title: Staffing that makes a difference
whyTeambemanningPage.desc: We're not the biggest — but we're the fastest, closest and most engaged. Here's why companies choose TEAMBEMANNING.

r1.title: Smaller company, closer collaboration
r1.desc: With us you get direct contact with those who manage staffing. No middlemen, fast decisions and a partner who truly listens.

r2.title: Lower overhead, better value
r2.desc: Our lean organization means lower costs — without compromising on quality or service.

r3.title: Flexible scope
r3.desc: From individual hours to long-term full-time assignments. We adapt staffing to your needs, not the other way around.

r4.title: Personal and smooth service
r4.desc: You always have a dedicated contact person who understands your business and requirements.

r5.title: Reliable matching
r5.desc: We match based on experience, skills and personality — not just availability.

r6.title: Quality control
r6.desc: Background checks, criminal record extracts, reference checks and verified qualifications.

r7.title: Administrative simplicity
r7.desc: Salary, tax, insurance and contracts — we take care of everything. You focus on your core business.

r8.title: Fast access to candidates
r8.desc: We have a broad candidate base and can often deliver staff within 24 hours.

r9.title: Long-term thinking
r9.desc: We build relationships, not transactions. Our goal is to be your staffing partner for the long term.

whyTeambemanningPage.bestOfBoth: We combine the best of both worlds
whyTeambemanningPage.bestOfBothDesc: The closeness and flexibility of a small company, combined with the professionalism and structure needed to deliver the right talent — every time. That's TEAMBEMANNING.

processPage.title: From need to the right person — smooth and secure
processPage.desc: We've built a process that's simple for you and safe for the candidate. Here's how it works.

s1.title: Contact
s1.desc: You reach out via phone, email or our contact form. We respond quickly — usually the same day.

s2.title: Needs analysis
s2.desc: We map your assignment in detail: roles, skill requirements, workplace, schedule and any specific wishes.

s3.title: Matching from candidate pool
s3.desc: We match from our quality-assured candidate pool. We select candidates based on experience, skills and personality.

s4.title: Quality assurance
s4.desc: Every candidate undergoes background checks, reference checks and verification of qualifications before being presented to you.

s5.title: Trial period
s5.desc: You get a one-week trial period. If it doesn't work out, we rematch — quickly and at no extra cost.

s6.title: Continued assignment
s6.desc: If the collaboration works, we continue. We follow up continuously and ensure you're always satisfied.

processPage.benefitsTitle: What does this mean for you?
processPage.benefitsDesc: No hassle — we take care of the entire process.

b1.title: No administration
b1.desc: We handle salary, tax, insurance and contracts.

b2.title: Fast access
b2.desc: We can often deliver staff within 24 hours.

b3.title: Flexibility
b3.desc: From hours to full-time — we adapt.

b4.title: Security
b4.desc: Trial period, background checks and ongoing follow-up.

processPage.ctaDesc: Contact us for a free needs analysis. We'll help you find the right person — fast.

jobPage.title: With us, you're not just a number
jobPage.desc: We're a smaller staffing company with a big heart. Here you get personal contact, a smooth start and room to grow.
jobPage.whyDesc: We want you to thrive, develop and feel secure. Here's what makes us different.

j1.title: Personal treatment
j1.desc: You're not a number. We get to know you and match you with assignments that fit.

j2.title: Safe introduction
j2.desc: As a smaller company, we can give you a smoother start with better knowledge transfer.

j3.title: Development opportunities
j3.desc: We help you grow — through new assignments, training and clear feedback.

j4.title: Professional standards
j4.desc: We work in a structured and serious way with clear routines and quality requirements.

j5.title: Team spirit
j5.desc: Inspired by sports, we believe in discipline, teamwork and lifting each other up.

j6.title: Fast and smooth
j6.desc: Shorter decision paths mean we can act quickly and flexibly.

jobPage.whoP1: We're looking for people who are driven, reliable and want to do a good job. You don't need the longest CV — but you need the right attitude.
jobPage.whoP2: We value responsibility, professionalism and the will to develop. Whether you have extensive experience or have just entered working life — with us you get a fair chance.
jobPage.youthTitle: We help young people into working life
jobPage.youthDesc: We believe in giving young people a good start in working life. Through structured introductions, clear expectations and personal support, we help young employees quickly enter working life in a safe and professional way.
jobPage.sportsDesc: TEAMBEMANNING has a strong interest in sports — not just as a hobby, but as a foundation for values. Discipline, teamwork, responsibility and structure are values we carry from the sports world into our daily work.
jobPage.applyDesc: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you. It only takes a minute.
jobPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself...
jobPage.ctaDesc: Contact us today — we look forward to hearing from you.

partnersPage.title: Companies that trust TEAMBEMANNING
partnersPage.desc: We build long-term partnerships and deliver results. Here are some examples.
partnersPage.logosDesc: We're proud to collaborate with companies across the Stockholm region.

c1.challenge: Needed to quickly add drivers during an expansion phase.
c1.solution: TEAMBEMANNING matched 5 experienced drivers within 48 hours, all with the right licenses.
c1.result: The client maintained delivery times without interruption throughout the expansion.

c2.challenge: High volumes during Black Friday and Christmas required rapid staff reinforcement.
c2.solution: TEAMBEMANNING delivered 12 warehouse workers with pick & pack experience.
c2.result: All orders were handled on time and the client saved time on recruitment.

c3.challenge: Needed reliable cleaning staff for multiple offices and properties.
c3.solution: TEAMBEMANNING matched quality-assured staff with office cleaning experience.
c3.result: Stable collaboration with high client satisfaction and consistent quality.

partnersPage.ctaDesc: Contact us for a free needs analysis.

newsPage.desc: Stay updated with news, insights and updates from TEAMBEMANNING Bemanning.

n1.title: TEAMBEMANNING expands in logistics staffing
n1.excerpt: We're expanding our candidate base and capacity in warehouse and logistics to meet growing demand in the Stockholm region.

n2.title: New quality assurance routines for candidates
n2.excerpt: We've introduced improved processes for background checks and reference checks to ensure even higher quality.

n3.title: Our youth employment initiative
n3.excerpt: TEAMBEMANNING invests in helping young adults into working life through structured introduction programs and personal follow-up.

n4.title: New partnership in the transport industry
n4.excerpt: We've started a new partnership with a leading transport company in the Stockholm area and are expanding our capacity.

n5.title: TEAMBEMANNING celebrates a successful year
n5.excerpt: We look back on a year of growth, strong partnerships and hundreds of successful assignments.

n6.title: How we match the right person to the right assignment
n6.excerpt: We share more about our matching process and what makes it effective and reliable.

servicesPage.title: Staffing that keeps your operations running
servicesPage.desc: We deliver quality-assured staff in four core areas — tailored to your specific needs and pace.
servicesPage.transportDesc: Drivers, couriers and distribution staff who deliver reliably, on time and with the right licenses.
servicesPage.logisticsDesc: Warehouse workers, forklift operators, pick & pack and terminal staff who keep your flows efficient.
servicesPage.industryDesc: Production workers, operators and industrial workers with practical skills and safety awareness.
servicesPage.cleaningDesc: Professional cleaning staff who deliver quality, reliability and flexibility.

q1.title: Interview & assessment
q1.desc: Every candidate goes through a structured interview process.

q2.title: Background check
q2.desc: We verify identity, experience and criminal record extracts.

q3.title: Reference check
q3.desc: We contact previous employers to ensure quality.

q4.title: Follow-up
q4.desc: Continuous dialogue with both client and consultant during the assignment.

transportPage.title: Reliable staffing for transport and distribution
transportPage.desc: We deliver drivers, courier staff and distribution workers who keep your deliveries on time.
transportPage.introTitle: Staffing for an industry that never stops
transportPage.introText: The transport industry requires staff who deliver — every day, regardless of weather or volume. TEAMBEMANNING understands the pace and demands of the industry and matches you with drivers and distribution staff who are reliable, experienced and ready to go.
transportPage.helpTitle: What we can help you with
transportPage.h1: Truck drivers with the right licenses
transportPage.experienceText: We have experience staffing for haulage companies, distribution companies, e-commerce logistics and third-party logistics. We understand the demands for punctuality, licensing and availability that characterize the transport industry.

w1.title: Fast access
w1.desc: We can often match and deliver staff within 24 hours.

w2.title: Verified licenses
w2.desc: We ensure the right driving licenses, ADR and other certificates.

w3.title: Flexible solutions
w3.desc: From individual runs to long-term assignments.

w4.title: Personal contact
w4.desc: You always have a dedicated contact person at TEAMBEMANNING.

w5.title: Trial period
w5.desc: One week trial period without risk.

w6.title: Administration
w6.desc: We handle salary, tax, insurance and contracts.

transportPage.n1: Urgent substitute needs due to illness
transportPage.n3: Staffing for new routes or tenders

logistikPage.title: Efficient staffing for warehouse and logistics
logistikPage.desc: We deliver warehouse staff, forklift operators and terminal staff who keep your flows efficient.
logistikPage.introTitle: Staffing that keeps the pace up
logistikPage.introText: In logistics, everything is about flows, pace and precision. TEAMBEMANNING delivers staff who understand how warehouses, terminals and distribution centers work — and who can come in, adapt quickly and contribute from day one.
logistikPage.helpTitle: What we can help you with
logistikPage.h1: Warehouse workers for picking, packing and dispatch
logistikPage.h2: Forklift operators with the right certificates
logistikPage.experienceText: We have delivered staff to e-commerce warehouses, third-party logistics, distribution centers and terminals. We understand your requirements for efficiency, order and the right staffing at the right time.

w1.title: Flexible scope
w1.desc: From individual days to full-time assignments — we adapt.

w2.title: Fast matching
w2.desc: We have a broad candidate base with logistics experience.

w3.title: Verified forklift licenses
w3.desc: All forklift operators have valid certificates and experience.

w4.title: Operational continuity
w4.desc: We ensure you never run out of staff.

w5.title: Trial period
w5.desc: One week trial period — test risk-free.

w6.title: Smooth administration
w6.desc: We handle everything from salary to insurance.

industriPage.title: Staffing for industry and production
industriPage.desc: We help companies in industry and production quickly find reliable staff for both temporary and long-term needs.
industriPage.introText: TEAMBEMANNING offers flexible staffing for industrial operations that need reinforcement in production, warehousing or daily operations. We match you with hardworking and reliable candidates who can quickly get up to speed.
industriPage.helpTitle: What we can help you with
industriPage.experienceText: We have experience staffing for industrial environments where diligence, work ethic and the ability to quickly adapt to routines and workflows are essential.

w1.title: Reliable staff
w1.desc: We match you with hardworking and responsible workers.

w2.title: Fast placement
w2.desc: We can often deliver staff at short notice.

w3.title: Flexible staffing
w3.desc: We handle both temporary and long-term needs.

w4.title: Personal matching
w4.desc: We match the right person to the right assignment.

w5.title: Trial period if needed
w5.desc: Test risk-free during a trial period.

w6.title: Administration we handle for you
w6.desc: Salary, tax, insurance and contracts — we take care of everything.

industriPage.ctaTitle: Need staffing for industry? Contact us today.

lokalvardPage.title: Professional cleaning with reliable staff
lokalvardPage.desc: We deliver carefully selected cleaning staff who guarantee quality, reliability and flexibility.
lokalvardPage.introText: Cleaning is about more than clean surfaces. It's about reliability, consistency and service. TEAMBEMANNING delivers cleaning staff who understand the importance of doing a thorough job, every time — whether it's offices, schools, healthcare facilities or industrial properties.
lokalvardPage.helpTitle: What we can help you with
lokalvardPage.h2: Cleaning for schools and public facilities
lokalvardPage.experienceText: We have experience staffing for property companies, office hotels, schools, healthcare environments and industrial facilities. We understand that every assignment has its specific requirements — and we adapt our staffing accordingly.

w1.title: Reliable staff
w1.desc: We match you with thorough, service-oriented staff who deliver every day.

w2.title: Quality control
w2.desc: Background checks and follow-up guarantee high quality.

w3.title: Flexibility
w3.desc: We adapt to your needs — from hours to full-time.

w4.title: Fast delivery
w4.desc: We can often deliver staff the next day.

w5.desc: One week trial period — test risk-free.
